name: Direction Aware Hover
summary: An intelligent hover effect component that detects cursor approach direction and animates content reveal or overlay from that direction, creating contextually-aware interactive feedback.
detailedDescription: The Direction Aware Hover component adds sophisticated interactivity by detecting which direction the cursor approaches from and animating reveals, overlays, or effects accordingly. This creates a contextually-aware interaction that feels intelligent and responsive. When users hover over an element, the component calculates the cursor's entry point relative to the element's center and triggers animations that originate from that direction - for example, an overlay might slide in from the top if the cursor approaches from above, or from the left if approaching from that side. This directional awareness creates a more natural, physical feeling interaction compared to standard hover effects that always animate the same way. The component supports various animation types including overlay slides, content reveals, image transitions, and effect triggers. Perfect for portfolio grids, product cards, image galleries, or any card-based layout where adding intelligent, directional hover responses enhances the interactive experience and perceived polish.
purpose: Create intelligent hover effects that respond to cursor approach direction
Add contextually-aware interactivity feeling natural and physical
Enhance perceived polish through sophisticated interaction design
Support various animation types triggered by directional detection
Differentiate interfaces through clever, unexpected hover behaviors
behavior: Detects cursor approach direction relative to element center
Calculates entry point from top, bottom, left, or right
Triggers directional animations originating from approach side
Supports overlay slides, reveals, and transitions
Maintains smooth 60fps animations during hover interactions
Returns smoothly to rest state when cursor exits
Works with touch interactions using last touch position
visualCharacteristics: Directional animations responding to cursor approach
Versatile styling supporting various content types
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
